arena-559.title: revert test
arena-559.author: xyao-nv
arena-559.summary: Re-enables 5 skipped eval runner tests with @pytest.mark.with_subprocess marker. Approved with suggestion to add timeout/start_new_session to run_eval_runner_and_check_no_failures().
arena-559.followup_note: New commit is merge from base branch (ci_stall). Changes: doc improvements (resume flag, model paths) + cosmetic docstring reword in subprocess.py. No functional changes to test code.

arena-567.title: Seun/nist gear insertion task example
arena-567.author: seun-doherty
arena-567.summary: Second review pass. Full NIST gear insertion RL workflow (3361 additions, 23 files). Focused on additional issues beyond prior review: fragile _REPO_ROOT, wp.to_torch memory aliasing risk, one-way ratchet in success_prediction_error, stale FK in IK loop, redundant roll/pitch clipping. Key concerns: observation function mutating action-term state (force_smooth write), global .gitattributes LFS scope too broad (*.jpg *.pth), shared events.py API migration bundled into task-specific PR.
arena-567.prior_review: kellyguo11 reviewed at 2026-04-09T23:51:32Z with 7 should-fix + 8 suggestions

arena-568.title: [DO NOT MERGE] Reproduce CI setup locally and Catch stalling
arena-568.author: xyao-nv
arena-568.summary: Draft diagnostic script (257 lines) to reproduce CI subprocess stalling. Well-structured phased approach. Suggestions: make PYTHON path configurable, consider orphan cleanup in loop mode, noted aggressive pkill pattern. Root cause confirmed: Kit startup CPU contention + orphaned telemetry = deadlock on 2 cores.

arena-569.title: cherrypick 557 and add orphan cleanup
arena-569.author: xyao-nv
arena-569.summary: Cherry-pick #557 + orphan cleanup for CI stalling. Initial review posted at first commit. Second commit only reduces num_envs 10→3 (trivial). No new issues found in incremental diff. 3 inline suggestions from initial review remain unaddressed but non-blocking.

arena-571.title: Refactor locomanipulation task
arena-571.author: alexmillane
arena-571.summary: Generalizes G1-specific locomanip pick-and-place task to be robot-agnostic. Expands contact sensor creation to handle objects with non-root rigid bodies. Requested changes: (1) debug prints left in terminations.py and task file, (2) NoneType crash bug in object_base.py and object_set.py when contact_against_object is None, (3) HEADLESS=False in tests will break CI, (4) docker tag changed to latest1 looks accidental, (5) commented-out code block should be removed.

isaaclab-5224.title: Newton color inconsistency
isaaclab-5224.author: huidongc
isaaclab-5224.summary: Fixes Newton rendering color inconsistency by setting default shape color (18% gray, 0.18 linear) for objects without materials, and camera clear color (0xFFEEEEEE) to match RTX renderer. Refactors test_rendering_correctness to collect all failures before reporting. Removes Newton RGB test skip. Suggestions: document color space in constants.py, add cross-reference comment for duplicated _DEFAULT_SHAPE_COLOR in physx_scene_data_provider.py.

isaaclab-5223.title: Pin Sphinx <9 on main for sphinx-multiversion compatibility
isaaclab-5223.author: AntoineRichard
isaaclab-5223.summary: Pins sphinx>=7.0,<9 and bumps sphinx-book-theme>=1.1 in docs/requirements.txt on main to prevent Sphinx 9.x from breaking sphinx-multiversion 0.2.4. Also suppresses autosummary.import_cycle warning in conf.py for Sphinx 7+ compatibility with -W builds. Mirrors develop branch fix from #5211. Clean, minimal, well-documented change.

5225.title: Supports Anymal-D Rough terrain training in newton
5225.author: ooctipus
5225.summary: Large multi-feature PR (87 files, +5344/-3744) for Newton rough terrain locomotion. Key components: NewtonSiteXformPrimView (GPU site tracking), FabricXformPrimView, collision pipeline config, friction/restitution APIs, material randomization refactor, raycaster spawning refactor, new velocity terminations, AnymalD Newton config. Flagged 5 should-fix issues: version mismatch in newton extension.toml vs changelog, physx changelog ordering, breaking MISSING->default events change, inefficient Newton material writes (mask vs index), O(N*S) gather_scales kernel. 6 suggestions including PR splitting.

arena-573.title: Make no-overlap a built-in solver behavior
arena-573.author: cvolkcvolk
arena-573.summary: Refactors no-overlap from user-managed NoCollision relations to built-in solver behavior controlled by clearance_m on RelationSolverParams (default 1cm). Removes NoCollision class, _add_pairwise_no_collision() from ArenaEnvBuilder, min_separation_m from ObjectPlacerParams. 12 commits, 12 files, well-tested (9 collision tests + 3 solver-level tests). Review: positive overall, flagged solver vs validation clearance asymmetry for anchor pairs, hardcoded slope, and O(n²) scaling note.

arena-526.title: Humanize concepts docs
arena-526.author: alexmillane
arena-526.summary: Major docs restructuring to eliminate AI-generated content from concept pages. Reorganizes flat concepts/ into scene/, task/, embodiment/, policy/ subdirectories. Rewrites all concept pages to be concise and human-readable. Adds 3 new images, removes policy_evaluation section (moved into policy/). Already approved by cvolkcvolk. Review: flagged duplicate line in sequential_tasks_design, RST formatting in metrics_design, unexplained gitignore entry, and submodule bump mixed with docs changes.

isaaclab-5227.title: Replace sphinx-multiversion with per-branch docs builds
isaaclab-5227.author: AntoineRichard
isaaclab-5227.summary: Removes sphinx-multiversion, adds per-branch CI docs builds with version switcher (JS + pydata-sphinx-theme), one-time migration workflow. 7 files changed (+435/-63). Key issues: (1) missing suppress_warnings from superseded #5223, (2) versions.json 404 breaks -W build, (3) shell injection risk in Python heredoc, (4) actions/checkout@v6, upload-artifact@v7, download-artifact@v8 don't exist (should be @v4). Suggestions: use fetch() instead of XHR, dedupe slug logic, document HEAD request fallback.

arena-574.title: Add WithinBox relation for constraining object placement to a region
arena-574.author: cvolkcvolk
arena-574.summary: New WithinBox unary relation constraining object position to an axis-aligned box in world coordinates. 7 files, +335/-9. Clean implementation following AtPosition pattern. WithinBoxLossStrategy uses linear_band_loss/single_boundary_linear_loss per axis. Registered in solver with slope=100. Bug found: _print_unary_relation_debug crashes for WithinBox (assumes x/y/z attrs). Also flagged: isinstance type-list scalability concern across 4 files, slope default mismatch (10 vs 100). Good test coverage (12 tests including solver integration).

arena-576.title: Deactivate all tests except for the subprocess tests.
arena-576.author: alexmillane
arena-576.summary: Diagnostic CI change: comments out all 3 in-process test steps (Newton, PhysX without cameras, PhysX with cameras) to isolate CI stall root cause. Only subprocess-spawning tests remain active. Flagged: not safe to merge to main as-is (silently drops most test coverage), should retarget to feature branch or add FIXME+tracking issue. Minor nit: pre-existing double space in remaining step name.

arena-577.title: Set isaacteleop version from ~1.0 to ~1.1.0 (latest stable)
arena-577.author: qianl-nv
arena-577.summary: One-line Dockerfile fix: tightens isaacteleop pin from ~=1.0 (>=1.0,<2.0) to ~=1.1.0 (>=1.1.0,<1.2.0), avoiding the 1.2.x regression that crashes teleop (nvbug 6066640). Verified PEP 440 semantics correct. Only reference to isaacteleop in repo. Approved.

arena-578.title: Install missing arena package into NGC docker.
arena-578.author: alexmillane
arena-578.summary: One-line Dockerfile fix: adds missing COPY isaaclab_arena_examples into Docker image. Package was already declared in setup.py find_packages() but never copied, masked by CI branch mounting. Verified placement is correct (after other arena packages, before pip install). Safe to merge.

isaaclab-5228.title: Add SDF collision and hydroelastic shape configuration
isaaclab-5228.author: AntoineRichard
isaaclab-5228.summary: Ports SDF/hydroelastic shape preparation from #5160 into #5219 config design. Adds SDFCfg configclass (body/shape regex patterns, per-pattern resolution overrides, hydroelastic stiffness), missing HydroelasticSDFCfg pipeline params, SDF manager methods, cloner integration to preserve triangle meshes for SDF shapes, and 14 unit tests. Generated by Claude Code. Review: agreed with Greptile P2 findings (max_resolution/target_voxel_size doc mismatch, dead-code warning block, silent first-visual-mesh truncation). Additional comments: implicit PhysicsManager._cfg coupling in cloner, sdf_cfg docstring vs initialize_solver behavior mismatch, plan doc weight in repo.
